testsuite.system-out: Browser and URL launched successfully Hoverover on account and List and Click on sigin is successful Searching the product(shoe),clicking on the first result and moving the control to it is successful click on WishList,click on add to cart is successful Browser and URL launched successfully Hoverover on account and List and Click on sigin is successful Searching the product(shoe),clicking on the first result and moving the control to it is successful click on WishList,click on add to cart is successful Hoverover on account and List and Click on signout is successful Browser and URL launched successfully Hoverover on account and List and Click on sigin is successful UserName and Password has been entered successfully Browser and URL launched successfully Hoverover on account and List and Click on sigin is successful UserName and Password has been entered successfully Test Case is Pass as Assertion is alos Pass Browser and URL launched successfully Hoverover on account and List and Click on sigin is successful Hoverover on account and List and Click on signout is successful Test Case is Pass as Assertion is alos Pass
